heading: Omitted
label: 131 to 152 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections provided for the National Training School for Boys which was governed and managed by a Board of Trustees until , at which time 1939 Reorg. Plan No. 2 (4 F.R. 2731, ) abolished the Board of Trustees and transferred the School and its functions (including the functions of the Board of Trustees) to the Department of Justice, to be administered by the Director of the Bureau of Prisons, under the direction and supervision of the Attorney General. The School was so operated until , when it was closed pursuant to order of the Attorney General.July 1, 1939May 15, 196853 Stat. 1431Section 131, , , provided that District reform school for boys should be known as National Training School for Boys.act May 27, 1908, ch. 200, § 135 Stat. 380Section 132, acts , ; , , dealt with appointment of a board of trustees to govern and manage the school.May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 119 Stat. 49May 27, 1908, ch. 200, § 135 Stat. 380Section 133, , , provided that one of the District commissioners should be a trustee of the school.act June 4, 1880, ch. 121, § 121 Stat. 156Section 134, , , provided for appointment of two consulting trustees of the school.act May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 1619 Stat. 52Section 135, acts , ; , , dealt with corporate capacity and powers of the board of trustees.May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 219 Stat. 49May 27, 1908, ch. 200, § 135 Stat. 380Section 136, acts , ; , , authorized board of trustees to make by-laws, rules, and regulations.May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 1519 Stat. 52June 5, 1900, ch. 71531 Stat. 267Section 137, , , dealt with contracts and purchases, the executive officer, and annual reports.act May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 1419 Stat. 51Section 138, , , dealt with appointment and compensation of a superintendent and other employees of the school.act May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 319 Stat. 49Section 139, acts , ; , , dealt with appointment, bonding, and duties of a treasurer of the school.May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 419 Stat. 49June 10, 1921, ch. 18, § 30442 Stat. 24Section 140, , , dealt with bonding of the superintendent.act May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 519 Stat. 50Section 141, , , dealt with powers and duties of the superintendent and subordinate employees.act May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 619 Stat. 50Section 142, , , provided that superintendent be in charge of lands and other property of the school, books of accounts, register of boys, and examination of school and accounts.act May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 719 Stat. 50Section 143, , , dealt with a report of school officers to District commissioners.act Mar. 3, 1881, ch. 134, § 121 Stat. 459Section 144, acts , ; , , dealt with disposition of proceeds of the school farm and shops.Aug. 6, 1890, ch. 724, § 126 Stat. 307Mar. 3, 1905, ch. 148333 Stat. 1211Section 145, acts , ; , , dealt with commitment of boys under age 17 to the school.May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 819 Stat. 50June 5, 1900, ch. 71531 Stat. 266Section 146, acts , ; , , related to period of detention.May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 919 Stat. 51June 5, 1900, ch. 71531 Stat. 267Section 147, , , limited number of boys at the school to number that can be properly accommodated.act May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 1019 Stat. 51Section 148, , , dealt with penalties for enticing boy from school or harboring escaped boy, and for arrest and return of escapees.act May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 1119 Stat. 51Section 149, , , dealt with employment and instruction of boys, apprenticing, and indentures of apprenticeship.act May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 1219 Stat. 51Section 150, , , dealt with release on parole of juvenile offenders committed to the school.act Feb. 26, 1909, ch. 217, § 135 Stat. 657Section 151, , , authorized board of trustees to parole boys, subject to approval of Attorney General in certain cases.act Feb. 26, 1909, ch. 217, § 235 Stat. 657Section 152, acts , ; , ; , , dealt with District support of boys committed, accounts, payment, and rates.May 3, 1876, ch. 90, § 1319 Stat. 51Aug. 1, 1914, ch. 223, § 138 Stat. 657Mar. 28, 1918, ch. 28, § 140 Stat. 494
